title: Metrics Detail View Default State and Group By Toggle Fix
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the metrics detail view to be collapsed by default, so that I see a simplified view unless I explicitly choose to see more detail.
description:
Set the metrics detail view to be off/collapsed by default for simplicity. Also fix a bug where toggling the Group By control inadvertently re-enables the detail view.

## Changes
- Default the detail toggle to off (collapsed)
- Fix Group By toggle re-enabling the detail view
- Detail view state does not need database persistence — resetting on page reload is acceptable
acceptance_criteria: Metrics detail view defaults to collapsed/off on page load
Toggling Group By does not re-enable the detail view
User can manually toggle detail view on when needed
Page reload resets detail view to collapsed state
ux_changes: Metrics detail view defaults to collapsed for a simpler initial experience. Fixed a bug where Group By toggle was inadvertently restoring the detail view.
implementation_notes: Developer proactively asked about database persistence for the toggle state. Decision was made to keep it session-only (no database persistence) for simplicity.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the bug and asked about persisting the toggle state to the database. Ryan confirmed session-only behavior was acceptable — no database persistence needed.
